title: helianthus rigidus subsp. subrhomboideus
intro: Helianthus rigidus subsp. subrhomboideus, also known as the rigid sunflower, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Helianthaceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus rigidus subsp. subrhomboideus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
